subcodes.first_line: O ye twin shining stars! Praise be to God, for your faces are resplendent with the light of guidance, and your dispositions are pleasing and favoured
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ستاره فرقدان الحمد لله بنور هدایت روی تابان دارید و خوی مشکین و مقبول
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
